executives.name: Alberto Calderon
executives.background: Alberto Calderon was appointed CEO of AngloGold Ashanti in September 2021. He was previously CEO of Orica and has held senior executive roles at BHP, including Group Executive and Chief Commercial Officer.

executives.name: Richard Jordinson
executives.background: Richard Jordinson was appointed Chief Operating Officer in October 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry and previously served as Senior Vice President: Australia and Ghana for AngloGold Ashanti.

executives.name: Gillian Doran
executives.background: Gillian Doran joined AngloGold Ashanti as Chief Financial Officer in January 2023. She previously served as CFO of Rio Tinto Aluminium and has extensive experience in the mining and metals industry.

board_of_directors.name: Jochen Tilk
board_of_directors.background: Jochen Tilk was appointed as an independent non-executive director and Chairman of the Board. He was previously the President and CEO of PotashCorp and Executive Chair of Nutrien Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Maria Ramos
board_of_directors.background: Maria Ramos is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CEO of Absa Group Limited and Director-General of the National Treasury of South Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Rhidwaan Gasant
board_of_directors.background: Rhidwaan Gasant is an independent non-executive director. He was previously the CEO of Energy Africa Limited and has served on various boards including MTN Group.

board_of_directors.name: Diane Jurgens
board_of_directors.background: Diane Jurgens is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CTO of BHP and has held senior leadership roles at The Walt Disney Company and General Motors.
